<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Nexus | Single-File Build</title>
  <link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="data:image/svg+xml;base64," />
  <link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="16x16" href="/favicon-16x16.png" />
  <link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="32x32" href="/favicon-32x32.png" />
  <link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="180x180" href="/apple-touch-icon.png" />
  <style>
    html, body { height: 100%; margin: 0; background: #000; }
    #app { position: fixed; inset: 0; }
    iframe { position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; border: 0; display: none; background: #000; }
    iframe.active { display: block; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="app">
    <iframe id="frame-home" title="Home"></iframe>
    <iframe id="frame-markets" title="Markets"></iframe>
    <iframe id="frame-dashboard" title="Dashboard"></iframe>
    <iframe id="frame-docs" title="Docs"></iframe>
  </div>

  <script>
    const PAGES = {
      home: "",
      markets: "",
      dashboard: "",
      docs: "",
    };

    const LOGO_DATA_URI = "data:image/svg+xml;base64,";

    const FRAME_BY_PAGE = {
      home: document.getElementById('frame-home'),
      markets: document.getElementById('frame-markets'),
      dashboard: document.getElementById('frame-dashboard'),
      docs: document.getElementById('frame-docs'),
    };

    const loaded = new Set();

    function decodeB64Utf8(b64) {
      const bin = atob(b64);
      const bytes = new Uint8Array(bin.length);
      for (let i = 0; i < bin.length; i++) bytes[i] = bin.charCodeAt(i);
      return new TextDecoder('utf-8').decode(bytes);
    }
